_about: GUI configuration entries keyed by name. Reference one via themes.json 'guiKey'.
_note: Keys starting with '_' are documentation and safely ignored by Gson.

example._comment_menuButtonFontSize: Font size of main menu buttons (pt) [int]
example._comment_menuButtonWidth: Preferred width of main menu buttons (px) [int]
example._comment_menuSmallBtnSize: Font size of small buttons (Settings, Check for Updates) (pt) [int]
example._comment_menuBtnBg: Background color for main menu buttons (hex/rgba/named) [String]
example._comment_menuBtnFg: Text color for main menu buttons (hex/rgba/named) [String]
example._comment_menuSmallBtnBg: Background color for small menu buttons (hex/rgba/named) [String]
example._comment_menuSmallBtnFg: Text color for small menu buttons (hex/rgba/named) [String]
example._comment_mpFieldFontSize: Font size of text fields (name, IP, port) (pt) [int]
example._comment_mpSmallFontSize: Font size of small info labels (cursor/operator status) (pt) [int]
example._comment_mpLabelColor: Text color for labels in 'offline'/'idle' state (hex/rgba/named) [String]
example._comment_panelBg: Background color of the control panel (hex/rgba) [String]
example._comment_panelBtnSize: Font size of panel buttons (Spawn Chip, Reset Dice, etc.) (pt) [int]
example._comment_panelBtnBg: Background color for in-game panel buttons (hex/rgba/named) [String]
example._comment_panelBtnFg: Text color for in-game panel buttons (hex/rgba/named) [String]
example._comment_panelSmallSize: Font size of small panel controls (Op password, Cursor button) (pt) [int]
example._comment_panelSmallBg: Background color for small panel controls (hex/rgba/named) [String]
example._comment_panelSmallFg: Text color for small panel controls (hex/rgba/named) [String]
example._comment_panelLabelColor: Text color for the network status label inside the panel (hex/rgba/named) [String]
example._comment_discardBg: Background color of the discard zone (hex/rgba) [String]
example._comment_discardBorderColor: Border color of the discard zone (hex/rgba/named) [String]
example._comment_discardBorderWidth: Border width of the discard zone (px) [int]
example._comment_overlayBg: Semi-transparent background covering the game behind the overlay (hex/rgba) [String]
example._comment_overlayContentBg: Background of the overlay content card (hex/rgba) [String]
example._comment_overlayPadding: Padding inside the overlay content box (px) [int]
example._comment_overlayRadius: Corner radius of the overlay content card (px) [int]
example._comment_plyNameSize: Font size of player names in the overlay (pt) [int]
example._comment_plyYouColor: Text color for the local player's name (hex/rgba/named) [String]
example._comment_plyGuestColor: Text color for remote players' names (hex/rgba/named) [String]
example._comment_cardTextSize: Font size of the value/suit text shown on flipped cards (pt) [int]
example._comment_settingsTextColor: Text color for titles, button labels, and property labels in settings (hex/rgba/named) [String]
example._comment_helpBtnSize: Font size of the help window buttons (Toggle Theme, Back) (pt) [int]
example._comment_helpBtnBg: Background color for help window buttons (hex/rgba/named) [String]
example._comment_helpBtnFg: Text color for help window buttons (hex/rgba/named) [String]
example._comment_settingsBtnBg: Background color for settings window buttons (hex/rgba/named) [String]
example._comment_settingsBtnFg: Text color for settings window buttons (hex/rgba/named) [String]
example._comment_resetBtnBg: Background color of 'Reset to Defaults' buttons (hex/rgba/named) [String]
